Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Nazzem 7awl masa2el moshtarka. L2a sha3bak. Ekhdmo sawa.

Footer.mission: L-neghayar akthar lil-a7san fi 7ayatna akhthar mma neta9awal ykon momken.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Al-taghayyur ma byakhosh an yakoon zaleel leyka yakoon 8awwee
Home.description: L2a akhar elly share ma3ak masa2el. Ekhdmo sawa. Quiet Riots bey-rebat al-sha3b 7awl frustrations moshtarka wa betahawwal al-shakawa ila collective action.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Batash 3an ayy frustration — trains, broadband, NHS, climate. Eza ejad, reh nbare2ak 8ad akhar share feha.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Shouf nafs al-masa2a 3ala kol monazzamat, walla kol masa2el fi monazzama wa7da. Zay ma yeshtan tango dancers.
Home.takeActionDesc: A7kar, actions, wa community — personalized le wa8tak wa skills.
Home.missionQuote: "L-neghayar akthar lil-a7san fi 7ayatna akhthar mma neta9awal ykon momken."
Home.basedOn: Based on the 2014 book Quiet Riots by Simon Darling

SuggestForm.successMessage: Quiet Riot2ak da5lna al-waiting room. Setup Guide ra7 tre8u8ha fi6awl sa3a. Yom5an tijma3 8ba2aat wa tasharak 2af5arak waqt al-mura ja3a.

RejectionReasons.title: Lesh Quiet Riots Tatar5as
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Fham 3amaliyat al-re2u8a
RejectionReasons.intro: Kull mu8tarah li-Quiet Riot jadida tujra3a mu ara ja3a Setup Guide li-tata2akkad inna tana sub al-mo8a3 wa testa67i3 taf3al faraka 7a8i8i. Hadhi al-2asbaab ka2 al-mu8tarah ka2 tarfod:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: 2iza mu8tarah2ak shakha 8ariba jidan min Quiet Riot 2illa mawjuda, ra7 nodo7 mu8tarah2ak fi al-mawjuda. Hadha ye7af9 al-community mo3a5asa wa te7mi 2al-tajazzua. Aktar 2ash5as wa7ira Quiet Riot wa7id, akbar al-ta2thir.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: 2iza 7asal hadha, ra7 tit2afa al-Quiet Riot al-mawjuda 2automatically 7atta tabda tata5az2 2ajlan.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots 3an 8adaya mushtara5a, mish 3an istihaf 2ash5as. Na rkaz 3ala al-mushakil al-nizamiyya — ashya2 zay broadband fasil, ta3z2 al-ta8at, 2aw healthcare na8is — mish shakawal shakhs ma3 2ash5as mo3aynan.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: 2iza enta 6a2if min shakhs 2aw public figure mo3ayyan, 7awal at8adir al-mushkila al-sa5ariyya badal. Ma3a: badal ma tasta8il CEO, 7ay8ar Quiet Riot 3an 3amal al-shirka.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: Ma2 yom5an nista67if Quiet Riots 2illa tafaa3 2aw ittan9im 2nushta6 ghayr sha3e. Hadha yashmal akhat ya85ad al-8anonun, tafaa3 al-unf, 2aw ka2 t85ad al-2ash5as.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: 2akyan 2ay mu8tarah ma2 tala8i likhdamatin 2ax2ara — rubbaysh ashya2 ghaya muddwaqa, 2aw al-Setup Guide 3awaz ma3lumat 2akthar. Fi hadhi al-7alat, ra7 ista8bal ru3sa sharaha lesh wa 2ay yom5an ta3mul.
RejectionReasons.reframe: Iada siya6a wa 7awal tani — sabbil al-2ism 2aw al-wasf li-2a7san tata6a ab al-8anun
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: 2indam ma3 Quiet Riot mawjuda — 8ad8a2ak ka2 7all maw7u8a
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: 2ard 3ala Setup Guide — 2iza 7asabt 2illa tarf8 kha6a2, 2ursal rusala ta sharha 7alak

AnonymousInfo.title: First Rioters Makhfiya
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: 2ay ma3na ikhfaa2
AnonymousInfo.intro: 2iza 7ada ibta8a Quiet Riot jadida, habadal yosbu7 awwal Quiet Rioter. Hadha sha2ar takrim — ash5as 2andu shaja3a ta7akallam 2awwal.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Mish yim5an akul wa7ad yab6aw 2ismahu 3ala 8ad8a 3alani. Hadha tamam tabdan. 2iza awwal Quiet Rioter 2ikhtara ta8a makhfi:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: 2esmahu wa sourat al-profile 2atkhi min safhat al-8ad8a
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Badge makhfi tab8a badal, 7atta ya3rif al-2ash5as 7ada ibta8a dun 2any ma3ruf myn
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides dal2iman ya3rufin myn ibta8a (li-a6rad al-moderation)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: Awwal Rioter yom5an taghayyar ra2yu badal wa 2ikhtir 2any yotaan tabakan
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Fee aktar sabab sahee7 li-ta8a makhfi:
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Enta prefer ta5li al-sa5b yat5akkam bi-nafsahu
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: 2iza ibta8at Quiet Riot makhfiyya bas ba3dan 8arrart iddak tutaan tabakan, yom5an tuballid al-tafdil bi-2ay wa8t 3abr inbox 2aw resala Setup Guide.

FirstRioterInfo.title: Awwal Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: Ma ta3ni bidayit Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Kol Quiet Riot yabda2 bi-shakh7 wa7id — Awwal Quiet Rioter. Hada hu l-shakh5 alladhi 3inda l-josor2a li-yatakallam 3an moushkilah wa yabda2 7arakat tatighiir.
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Kawn awwal shakh5 yarf3a moushkilah ya2ti m3ah ta3reef khas:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Badge "Awwal Quiet Rioter" daimiih 3ala sa7ifat l-issue
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: L-5iyr bayna l-ta3reef l-3alani aw l-bob2 mutakhaffi
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: 3odwiyyah otomatikiyyah kaawal shakh5 intama2 lil-Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Tahdith2at bayna ma t5ataab ta7keem l-eqtira7, approval, aw l-live
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: Kawn First Rioter hub 2onor, leysh wa7da ta3lif 7amilah. No strict requirements, lakkin na7na nitshajji3 l-First Rioters yaa:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Daffaa3 3an l-issue bi-share m3a ghayruhum alladheen y5tammoun
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Istaqbil awdaa jadid alladheen yintami2un lil-Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Bayna ma taqtara7 Quiet Riot jadid, anta takhtar kif t7ib li-yta3raf biih:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: 3Alani — 2ismak wa profayl yaba2un 3ala sa7ifat l-issue kaawal Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Mutakhaffi — badge mutakhaffin yaba2 badalan, ya7mi hiwiyyatak
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Taqdar t8ayyer al-preferences ayy waqt min khilal l-inbox aw bi-l-ittis2al m3a Guide
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Kul li-qaul: eqtara7 Quiet Riot jadid min khilal l-website aw WhatsApp bot. Eza approval l-eqtira7ak min l-Setup Guides, tisir Awwal Quiet Rioter lil-issue.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: L-eqtira7ak yamor bi-3amaliyyit ta7keem bayna l-Setup Guides yafhasun wa y2akkidu yama3a l-guidelines. Mumkin yasaluk afham akthar, yaqtra7 i-merge m3a issue mawjud, aw yuwafaqu li-l-live.

Share.title: Your Quiet Riots Share
Share.profileLink: Learn more about your Quiet Riots share →
Share.heroSubtitle: Every Quiet Rioter worldwide is offered one share in Quiet Riots — the company itself.
Share.ownershipTitle: What Does Owning a Share Mean?
Share.ownershipDesc: As a shareholder, you own a real piece of Quiet Riots. This is not a token, a badge, or a metaphor — it is a genuine share in a UK limited company, registered with Companies House.
Share.ownershipPoint1: You become a legal co-owner of Quiet Riots
Share.ownershipPoint2: Your share grows in value as the company grows
Share.ownershipPoint3: You may receive dividends if the company distributes profits
Share.ownershipPoint4: You have shareholder rights under UK company law
Share.considerationDesc: Under UK company law (Companies Act 2006), shares cannot be issued for free. A nominal payment — called the consideration — is required for the share to be legally valid.
Share.considerationAmount: The consideration for your share is 10 pence (or the equivalent in your local currency).
Share.considerationWallet: This is deducted from your Quiet Riots wallet when you proceed.
Share.considerationRefund: If your application is rejected, the 10p is automatically refunded to your wallet.
Share.growthSharesTitle: How This Works at Different Valuations
Share.growthSharesDesc: Your share uses a growth share structure — a special class that only becomes valuable above a certain company valuation. This means minimal tax at the time of issue.
Share.preSeedDesc: Shares issued at nominal value. You pay 10p. No meaningful tax event.
Share.seedDesc: Same nominal value. Growth share hurdle set above current valuation.
Share.seriesADesc: Pre-emption rights waived for user share pool. Hurdle minimises current value.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle ensures limited current value despite high company valuation.
Share.seriesCDesc: User share pool is a defined cap table percentage. No new dilutive issuances.
Share.ipoDesc: User shares convert to ordinary tradeable shares. Capital gains tax may apply on sale.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: Owning a share comes with some responsibilities:
Share.responsibility1: Tax obligations depend on your country of residence — consult a qualified advisor
Share.responsibility2: There is no guarantee the company will reach any valuation
Share.responsibility3: The share structure may be modified as the company grows
Share.responsibility4: This is not legal, tax, or investment advice
Share.disclaimer1: This is a simplified explanation — not legal, tax, or investment advice.
Share.disclaimer2: Each user's tax obligations depend on their country of residence.
Share.disclaimer3: There is no guarantee the company will reach any valuation.
Share.disclaimer4: The share structure may be modified as the company grows.
Share.disclaimer5: Users should consult qualified advisors in their own country.
Share.eligibilityDesc: To qualify for the share offer, you need to:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Be a verified user (name and email or phone confirmed)
Share.eligibilityMet: You are eligible for your share!
Share.proceedDesc: Ready to become a shareholder? The 10p consideration will be deducted from your wallet.
Share.proceedConfirm: A nominal payment of 10p will be deducted from your wallet. This is a legal requirement for the share to be valid.
Share.proceedSuccess: Your application has been submitted! A Share Guide will review it shortly.
Share.insufficientFunds: You need at least 10p in your wallet to proceed.
Share.declineDesc: If you don't want a share, you can permanently decline the offer. No payment will be taken.
Share.declineConfirm: Are you sure? This is permanent and cannot be undone. You will never be offered a share again.
Share.declineSuccess: You have declined the share offer.
Share.withdrawDesc: Cancel your application and receive a full refund of your 10p.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Are you sure? Your 10p will be refunded to your wallet.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Your application has been withdrawn. 10p has been refunded to your wallet.
Share.reapplyDesc: Your previous application was rejected. You can reapply with a fresh 10p payment.
Share.passwordDesc: The share section is password-protected for your security.
Share.identityDesc: To complete your share application, we need to verify your identity. This information is encrypted and stored securely.
Share.identitySuccess: Your identity has been submitted for verification.
Share.identityMustBe18: You must be at least 18 years old.
Share.issueEligibilityBanner: You are eligible for your share
Share.issueRequestReceived: Your request has been received. We will be in contact in due course.
